eyeMasking.title: Eye Detection & Masking Tool
eyeMasking.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access to use this feature.
eyeMasking.clickToDetect: 👆 Click "Detect & Mask Eyes" to automatically find and mask eyes. Then click "Upload Masked Image" below to save.
eyeMasking.noteNoGlasses: ⚠️ Note: Works best with clear, unobstructed eyes (no glasses).
eyeMasking.useManualMode: Please use Manual Masking mode instead, or ensure eyes are clearly visible without glasses.
eyeMasking.clickAndDrag: Click and drag on the image to create masks
eyeMasking.masksApplied: ✅ {count} mask(s) applied. Click "Upload Masked Image" to compress and upload to S3.
eyeMasking.originalStaysInBrowser: 🔒 Original image stays in browser - only masked version is uploaded.
eyeMasking.canUseManualMode: You can still use Manual Masking mode to create masks by dragging on the image.
eyeMasking.privacyDescription: Your original image is processed entirely in your browser and never stored. Only the masked image is uploaded to AWS S3.
eyeMasking.pleaseWaitForModel: Please wait for the model to load and select an image.
eyeMasking.onlyPngJpgWebpAllowed: Only PNG, JPG, and WEBP images are allowed.
eyeMasking.modelLoadFailed: Failed to load AI model: {error}. You can still use Manual Masking mode. Please check your internet connection, browser console, or try refreshing the page.
eyeMasking.eyeDetectionValidationFailed: Eye Detection Issue: {issues}. Please remove glasses if wearing them, ensure eyes are clearly visible, or use Manual Masking mode instead.
eyeMasking.pleaseDetectEyes: Please detect eyes first by clicking "Detect & Mask Eyes" button.
eyeMasking.pleaseCreateMask: Please create at least one mask by dragging on the image.
eyeMasking.awsBucketNotConfigured: AWS S3 bucket name not configured. Please set VITE_AWS_S3_BUCKET environment variable.
eyeMasking.cameraVideoNotLoading: Camera video is not loading. Please try closing and reopening the camera.
eyeMasking.cameraNotReady: Camera not ready. Please wait a moment and try again.
eyeMasking.videoNotReady: Video not ready. Please wait a moment and try again.
eyeMasking.videoDimensionsNotAvailable: Video dimensions not available. Please wait a moment and try again.
eyeMasking.errorCapturingPhoto: Error capturing photo. Please try again.
eyeMasking.errorCreatingImage: Error creating image. Please try again.
eyeMasking.errorProcessingImage: Error processing captured image. Please try again.
eyeMasking.errorDetectingEyes: Error detecting eyes. Please try manual masking.
eyeMasking.noEyesDetectedUseManual: No eyes detected. You can use manual masking instead.
eyeMasking.noValidCroppedMasks: No valid cropped masks to upload
eyeMasking.failedToUploadToS3: Failed to upload images to S3

userProfile.postsWithCommentsByUser: Posts with comments by this user
userProfile.noPostsWithCommentsByUser: No posts with comments by this user yet
userProfile.noEyeMaskingImages: No eye masking images uploaded yet

userProfile.imageSizeTooLarge: Image size should be less than 5MB

admin.title: Title
admin.author: Author
admin.name: Name
admin.confirmBlockDescription: Are you sure you want to block {name}? This will prevent them from accessing the platform.
admin.confirmUnblockDescription: Are you sure you want to unblock {name}? They will be able to access the platform again.
admin.confirmDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone and all their data will be permanently removed.
admin.confirmApproveMembership: Are you sure you want to approve {name}'s membership request for {board}?
admin.confirmRejectMembership: Are you sure you want to reject {name}'s membership request for {board}?
admin.confirmDeleteMembership: Are you sure you want to delete {name}'s membership from {board}? This action cannot be undone.
admin.confirmDeleteS3File: Are you sure you want to delete this file from S3? This action cannot be undone.
admin.confirmDeletePostDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the post "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
admin.confirmActivatePostDescription: Are you sure you want to activate the post "{title}"? It will be visible to all users.
admin.confirmDeactivatePostDescription: Are you sure you want to deactivate the post "{title}"? It will be hidden from users.
admin.confirmDeleteCommentDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this comment? "{body}" This action cannot be undone.
admin.confirmDeleteBoardDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the board "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and all posts in this board will be affected.
admin.confirmActivateBoardDescription: Are you sure you want to activate the board "{name}"? It will be visible to all users.
admin.confirmDeactivateBoardDescription: Are you sure you want to deactivate the board "{name}"? It will be hidden from users.
admin.confirmDeleteEyeMaskedImageDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this eye masked image? This action cannot be undone.
admin.deleteEyeMaskedImageError: Failed to delete eye masked image
admin.confirmDeleteReportDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this report? This action cannot be undone.
admin.confirmDeleteCategoryDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the category "{name}"? This action cannot be undone. If this category is being used by boards, deletion will fail.
admin.confirmActivateCategoryDescription: Are you sure you want to activate the category "{name}"? It will be available for use in boards.
admin.confirmDeactivateCategoryDescription: Are you sure you want to deactivate the category "{name}"? It will be hidden and cannot be used in new boards.

profile.title: Profile
profile.demoProfile: This is a demo profile page. In production, these actions would be fully functional.

settings.title: Settings
settings.demoSettings: This is a demo settings page. Changes are not persisted in this demo.

about.title: About Us
about.welcomeDescription: HiNobody is a progressive web application designed for eye detection and masking using AI technology. Our platform provides advanced image processing capabilities while maintaining user privacy and security.
about.techDescription: Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and TensorFlow.js for cutting-edge AI capabilities. Our backend uses NestJS with Prisma for robust data management.
about.contactDescription: For inquiries or support, please contact us through the application.

dummyExample.title: Dummy Example Route
dummyExample.description: This is a dummy route created for understanding the routing system.
dummyExample.storedInLocalStorage: Stored in localStorage, not in URL
dummyExample.publicDescription: Public routes are accessible to everyone, even without authentication.
dummyExample.privateDescription: Private routes require authentication. Users are redirected to login if not authenticated.
dummyExample.step4: Export a default React component (no wrapper needed!)
dummyExample.step5: The route is automatically available at
dummyExample.step6: RouteGuard handles protection automatically based on config!
dummyExample.tryLoggingIn: Try logging in to see how private routes work!
